meaning: n.止头痛药,助消化药,镇静剂
examples: Deep in a trance, Baryo, a Hindu holy man, blesses offerings bound for Mount Bromo.
There are only a few Hindus on Java nowadays, and most of them live in the Tennger Mountains around Bromo.
The synthetic methods of 5 bromo-2-aminothiazole, its hydrobromide and hydrochloride have been studied in this paper.
Sagamore Farm was founded in 1925 by Isaac Emerson, founder of Bromo-Seltzer.
